AFFECT [[15136737896827182809]] 
    IMPORT Qt.labs.folderlistmodel [[180923.180922]]
    TRAVERSE [[7711468349764991]]#[[6504254477]]
    LOCATE AFTER [[5972374]]
    INSERT {
    FolderListModel {
        ~&5972374&~: sleepScreens
        ~&7082663378949&~: "file:///home/root/sleepScreens/"
        nameFilters: ["*.png"]
        showDirs: ~&214625660372&~
    }
    }
    REBUILD [[16364404249624396525]] 
    LOCATE BEFORE STREAM \ ~&7083121450889&~ \
    INSERT {
		~&197091758&~ ~&214622615378&~ = sleepScreens.~&214622615378&~;
		~&5972376&~ (~&214622615378&~ > 0) {
			~&214622607920&~ ~&214629676161&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&214626058827&~(~&6502909715&~.random() * ~&214622615378&~);
			~&6504167510&~ = sleepScreens.~&197086313&~(~&214629676161&~, "fileURL");
		}
	}	    
    END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE ?#[[16041628731068125427]]
    LOCATE BEFORE ALL
    REBUILD [[233748328658231]]
    LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT { sleepScreens.~&214622615378&~ === 0 && }
    END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
